parsed_output.justification: Based on the claims, Kevin was the Robber and Kaelan was the Troublemaker. Kevin swapped cards with Kaelan, making Kevin the Troublemaker and Kaelan the Robber. Kaelan (as Troublemaker) swapped Jessica (Minion) and Daniel (Drunk), making Jessica the Drunk and Daniel the Minion. Finally, Daniel (as Drunk) swapped his card with the center. Since Jessica (the starting Minion) reported seeing no Werewolf, the Werewolf card must have been in the center, which Daniel then swapped into his hand. Therefore, Daniel is the Werewolf.
